name: @forgeax/hello-2d-flashlight
description: 2D scene: flat sprite-lit demo with a SpotLight sweeping the sprite plane + a PointLight circle patch (tweak-20260701 M2).

forgeax._comment: smokeInvocation = self-contained SSOT. hello-2d-flashlight covers the flat sprite-lit shading model AC-1 (SpotLight sweep on the sprite plane, posZ=0/directionZ=0, wedge center brightness > 0.5) + AC-2 (PointLight circle patch, center > 0.7 / edge < 0.1) via dawn-node pixel readback. Browser probe asserts sprite-lit pipeline is built end-to-end and zero device validation errors.

bundle-size.reason: demo workspace; bundle size tracked at @forgeax/engine-runtime + engine-app + engine-shader package level

fps.reason: fps no-regression covered by hello-cube / hello-app gates; 2d-flashlight perf equals sprite-lit which is bounded by 1 sprite + 2 lights (URP cap 4)

bench.reason: perf-critical bench (per-light forward shading) anchored at @forgeax/engine-runtime; 2d-flashlight reuses the same lighting buffer pipeline as sprite-lit -- no demo-level bench

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; this is the tweak-20260701 M2 acceptance demo for the flat sprite-lit shading model
